title: miltitzia glaberrima
intro: Miltitzia glaberrima, also known as the Golden Rain tree, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and saponins, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Miltitzia glaberrima can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various health conditions.
